examples: The employees of Winthrop Media waste another day bitching about how they're undervalued.
"Howe cannot be far," said Winthrop, pointing to a faded map sketched on worn hemp paper.
On paper, Mr Winthrop had been doing everything right regarding plans to grow the business.
"They'd call me when they'd stall, as all small businesses do, " says Mr Winthrop.
